message.content: Yo, Alex, you call yourself a friend? Nah, you're the human equivalent of a participation trophy—shiny on the outside, worthless inside. Every time you open your mouth, it's like a mosquito buzzing in my ear: annoying as hell and begging to get swatted. Pathetic doesn't even cover it; you're the guy who shows up to the party empty-handed, eats all the snacks, and then whines about how nobody appreciates you. Useless? Bro, if laziness was an Olympic sport, you'd still come in last because you'd nap through the qualifiers. Your life's a nonstop fail reel—can't hold a job, can't keep a secret, can't even tie your shoes without tripping over your own ego. You're not just a loser, Alex; you're the reason participation trophies were invented, so even bottom-feeders like you get a pity prize. Sit down before you embarrass yourself more, you walking waste of oxygen. Mic drop.
